title: lepisorus morrisonensis
intro: Lepisorus morrisonensis, also known as Taiwan fern, is a species of fern native to Taiwan and the Ryukyu Islands. It is a type of fern used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus morrisonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusion, and tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
